introSection: Skywalker is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Interpark currently located at Parque Guanabara in Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Rocket Rollercoaster opened in May 2024 at Lightwater Valley. The coaster previously operated at Camel Creek Adventure Park as Air-Bender, where it opened in 2019 and closed in 2022. It remained standing but not operating during the 2023 season for unknown reasons. Prior to this, it originated as Cyclone at SkyPark in Bulgaria where it operated from 2013 to 2018.

At Lightwater Valley, Rocket Rollercoaster operated for the final time in September 2024. In March 2025, the coaster was removed from the park map and website. It was then dismantled, being removed from the park and was later sold in early 2025.

The roller coaster was then moved to Parque Guanabara in Brazil, being purchased for 7 million euros. It was first announced by the park on 28 July 2025.

It later reopened in November 2025 as the park's first roller coaster.

fullText:
Skywalker is a steel roller coaster built by Italian manufacturer Interpark currently located at Parque Guanabara in Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil.

Rocket Rollercoaster opened in May 2024 at Lightwater Valley. The coaster previously operated at Camel Creek Adventure Park as Air-Bender, where it opened in 2019 and closed in 2022. It remained standing but not operating during the 2023 season for unknown reasons. Prior to this, it originated as Cyclone at SkyPark in Bulgaria where it operated from 2013 to 2018.

At Lightwater Valley, Rocket Rollercoaster operated for the final time in September 2024. In March 2025, the coaster was removed from the park map and website. It was then dismantled, being removed from the park and was later sold in early 2025.

The roller coaster was then moved to Parque Guanabara in Brazil, being purchased for 7 million euros. It was first announced by the park on 28 July 2025.

It later reopened in November 2025 as the park's first roller coaster.
